message:
feat: Add sys `from sys import *` support

Add handler in from_imports.zig to expand `from sys import *`
into explicit const declarations for 20 common sys module exports:
platform, version_info, version, implementation, byteorder, maxsize,
float_info, int_info, hash_info, exit, getrecursionlimit,
setrecursionlimit, get_int_max_str_digits, set_int_max_str_digits,
stdin, stdout, stderr, getrefcount, getsizeof, executable.

This follows the same pattern used for stringprep, itertools, and
contextlib modules.
